title: 10 Farm-Safe Herbal Creams for Arthritis Relief
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams have been used to help alleviate symptoms of arthritis due to their anti-inflammatory and anti-arthritic properties. The creams contain compounds such as glycyrrhetic acid, which has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, thereby reducing inflammation and pain in the joints. Another key constituent is licorice extract, which has been found to have antioxidant properties that help to protect the joints from oxidative damage. Additiona...
